Summary: [Epic] CTOLens hybrid briefing engine
Description: Ship the Signal → Recommendation → Executive Briefing pipeline behind feature flags. Includes briefing_pipeline.py CTOLens API routes dashboard panel share/PDF parity and pytest coverage. Separate from metrics enrichment scheduling work.
Acceptance Criteria: Epic accepted when hybrid engine is deployed to staging with flags on smoke-tested and documented in docs/HYBRID-BRIEFING-ENGINE.md

Summary: [Epic] CTOLens production release
Description: Release unpushed CTOLens work (hybrid engine + metrics enrichment Phases 0-2) through staging to production with flag rollout and rollback plan.
Acceptance Criteria: Staging validated; production deploy complete; docs/backlog README reflects shipped state

Summary: [Epic] Portfolio health dashboard Phase 2
Description: Phase 2 of portfolio-health-dashboard.md: historical snapshots trends what-changed-since-last-check connector uptime and background jobs. Requires new persistence beyond live compute MVP.
Acceptance Criteria: Design approved; snapshot storage and at least one trend view shipped behind ENABLE_PORTFOLIO_DASHBOARD

Summary: Enable CTOLens feature flags on staging
Description: Set ENABLE_CTOLENS_BRIEFING ENABLE_SIGNAL_ENGINE ENABLE_RECOMMENDATION_ENGINE on staging Railway service. Optionally ENABLE_CTOLENS_SCHEDULED_ENRICHMENT for schedule QA.
Acceptance Criteria: Staging /api/feature-flags returns true for ctolens flags; Overview CTOLens panel loads without errors

Summary: Merge CTOLens stack and run CI on staging
Description: Merge local master commits (hybrid pipeline + enrichment + CI) to staging branch. GitHub Actions pytest must pass.
Acceptance Criteria: staging branch green CI; staging app boots with Postgres; no regressions on login/workspaces

Summary: Staging smoke test CTOLens briefing flow
Description: Manual smoke: fast briefing live metrics refresh diagnostics share PDF workspace schedule save. Document results in ticket.
Acceptance Criteria: Fast and enriched runs succeed; header_summary updates; share/PDF exclude raw signals; run log populated

Summary: Production deploy CTOLens with flag rollout
Description: Deploy master to production. Enable CTOLens flags incrementally. Define rollback: disable flags revert deploy.
Acceptance Criteria: Production serves CTOLens panel; flags documented in DEPLOYMENT.md; rollback steps verified

Summary: Sync backlog docs with shipped state
Description: Update docs/backlog/README.md and plan checkboxes to match Jira Done status. Remove stale not-implemented language.
Acceptance Criteria: README and CTOLENS-METRICS-ENRICHMENT-PLAN status match production reality

Summary: Signal engine staging validation
Description: Validate signal engine against sample workspace: financial delivery portfolio signals fire correctly after enriched run. pytest test_signal_engine.py passes in CI.
Acceptance Criteria: Signals API returns expected categories; delivery signals only after fetch_metrics=true

Summary: Recommendation engine and feedback on staging
Description: Validate recommendations ranked from signals; feedback POST persists to workspace settings; Accept/Dismiss works in dashboard.
Acceptance Criteria: Recommendations API returns ranked actions; feedback visible on refresh; tests pass

Summary: Executive briefing panel QA
Description: QA Overview CTOLens Daily Briefing panel: executive summary top risks opportunities recommended actions projects requiring attention confidence block.
Acceptance Criteria: All sections render with real data; empty states handled; mobile layout acceptable

Summary: Share and PDF parity for CTOLens briefing
Description: Public share link and PDF export use normalize_briefing_for_export / briefing_resolver CTOLens path. No raw signals or diagnostics in exports.
Acceptance Criteria: Share URL and PDF contain executive sections only; matches dashboard narrative

Summary: Optional AI executive polish pilot
Description: Pilot ENABLE_AI_EXECUTIVE_BRIEFING on staging only. Verify deterministic truth guardrails restore ranked actions after LLM polish.
Acceptance Criteria: With flag on staging summary polishes without changing do_first actions; flag off unchanged

Summary: Wire on_import to enriched pipeline after CSV import
Epic Link: [Epic] CTOLens metrics enrichment & nimble briefing UX
Description: When workspace.settings.ctolens_schedule.on_import is true run refresh_workspace_ctolens_briefing with fetch_metrics=true after successful import. Default remains fast only.
Acceptance Criteria: on_import false: fast briefing only; on_import true: enriched run triggered; import response indicates run type

Summary: Configurable metrics staleness threshold
Epic Link: [Epic] CTOLens metrics enrichment & nimble briefing UX
Description: Replace hard-coded METRICS_STALE_DAYS=7 with workspace setting or env var (e.g. 24h/7d). assess_extended_staleness uses configurable value.
Acceptance Criteria: Threshold configurable; banner reflects custom age; default 7 days unchanged for existing workspaces

Summary: Always-visible Fast and Live refresh on CTOLens panel
Epic Link: [Epic] CTOLens metrics enrichment & nimble briefing UX
Description: Show Update briefing (fast) and Refresh live metrics buttons on CTOLens panel always not only when staleness banner appears.
Acceptance Criteria: Both buttons visible on Overview CTOLens panel; fast completes quickly; live shows progress message

Summary: Surface diagnostics panel in CTOLens briefing body
Epic Link: [Epic] CTOLens metrics enrichment & nimble briefing UX
Description: Ensure renderCtolenBriefingPanelBody appends collapsed Signal and connector details from API diagnostics on every CTOLens load not legacy path only.
Acceptance Criteria: Diagnostics visible after fast and enriched runs; shows connector_runs and signal counts; absent from share/PDF

Summary: Integrate Setup navigation to workspace settings
Epic Link: [Epic] CTOLens metrics enrichment & nimble briefing UX
Description: Dashboard Setup opens /workspace/{id}/settings with Back to Dashboard. Toolbar Setup button always visible for single-workspace users.
Acceptance Criteria: Setup navigates to full settings page; schedule card and connectors accessible; no dead inline-only path

Summary: Manual QA enrichment acceptance checklist
Epic Link: [Epic] CTOLens metrics enrichment & nimble briefing UX
Description: Execute plan success criteria: login no connector HTTP; fast under 5s; live updates header; diagnostics not in PDF; unconfigured connectors omitted from diagnostics.
Acceptance Criteria: Checklist signed off in ticket; any failures filed as bugs

Summary: Design metric snapshot schema
Description: Design additive Postgres storage for portfolio metric snapshots (health score burn connector status). No breaking changes to assignments table.
Acceptance Criteria: Schema doc + migration plan reviewed; idempotent migration in canonical_schema or store

Summary: Background snapshot job for portfolio trends
Description: Scheduled or on-demand job writes portfolio snapshots. Feature-flagged. Railway cron or internal endpoint pattern consistent with CTOLens enrichment.
Acceptance Criteria: Snapshots persist; API can read last N; job failures logged without breaking dashboard load

Summary: What changed since last check UI
Description: Overview section showing assignment and health score deltas since previous snapshot or last login.
Acceptance Criteria: User sees meaningful change summary when snapshots exist; graceful empty state when no history

Summary: Burn trajectory and runway views
Description: Trend views for monthly burn vs target using snapshot history. Runway estimate when data supports it.
Acceptance Criteria: Chart or table shows burn direction; requires snapshot epic dependency

Summary: Connector uptime history
Description: Track connector test/sync outcomes over time per assignment. Surface in Portfolio Details or connector health panel.
Acceptance Criteria: History list or trend for connector status; live test still works without history
